Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt Unique ID: 12f4ac127cd66764c9c8fa8609a0d72b075d54f13bb171920904ce80d237de04 Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +40 to maximum Life +44 to Strength +49 to Dexterity +60 to maximum Life 26% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

Rarity: UNIQUE Polaric Devastation Opal Ring Unique ID: 8e3eb63c9e0d743bbe7d956adffd368860c32adf4ec3fe2e2eddc11d877b541b Item Level: 81 LevelReq: 80 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Your Chilling Towers freeze enemies for 0.2 seconds while they are affected by chilling beams 25% increased Elemental Damage 23% increased Global Critical Strike Chance +40% to Fire Resistance +48% to Cold Resistance 11% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies Left Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Ash for 5 seconds when you Ignite them Right Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Frost for 5 seconds when you Freeze them

Rarity: RARE Armageddon Hold Paladin Gloves Armour: 506 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.327 Energy Shield: 101 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.3237 Unique ID: 453d41b7ae8f6fe6bae3e396cc844aef13ed43f72c1ee8c2b9317ea1b5065d39 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-R-R-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 0.3% of Fire Damage Leeched as Life Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.3 metres 96% increased Armour and Energy Shield +127 to maximum Life +61 to maximum Mana +46% to Fire Resistance +24% to Lightning Resistance +31% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: RARE Entropy Emblem Thorium Spirit Shield Energy Shield: 71 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.6458 Unique ID: fceb33155ed9e3f2f9595298e7519c4be16aa6405fc7428187e4066ec3d176ec Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-B LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 0 {fractured}73% increased Chance to Block +48 to Intelligence Regenerate 22.5 Life per second +1 to Level of all Lightning Spell Skill Gems +15% to all Elemental Resistances {crafted}4% Chance to Block Spell Damage

Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Dragonfang's Flight Onyx Amulet Unique ID: 1e47fb5d12849b073209dc14b96ca4a4d8d01f5c67318b433c1b6156db88365a Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates As The Mountain +11 to all Attributes +3 to Level of all Penance Brand Gems +9% to all Elemental Resistances 8% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Items and Gems have 6% reduced Attribute Requirements

Rarity: UNIQUE Lost Unity Formless Ring Unique ID: f0e847e0484cc0d3b39ddd02f3a1352f982913948fc257e0fc11e6129582c22a Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 42 Implicits: 1 7% increased Global Defences Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill +14% to all Elemental Resistances +33% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: RARE Rift Peak Archdemon Crown Armour: 268 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.0991 Energy Shield: 56 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.2431 Unique ID: a2a9dc5d16025162bcd7fadc9b7d155ef2dd6d11d649eb6a368aa0d996ec3d7a Elder Item Item Level: 88 Quality: 19 Sockets: B-G-R-R LevelReq: 75 Implicits: 2 -2 to Level of Socketed Support Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Burning Damage Socketed Gems deal 30% more Elemental Damage +57 to Intelligence +74 to maximum Life 34% increased Burning Damage 8% increased Area of Effect {crafted}20% increased Armour and Energy Shield {crafted}+16 to maximum Life

Rarity: UNIQUE Obliteration Omen Wand Unique ID: 066a184a05cdfe207b6572f00ad7d9dacc4f44f5c85f3e3e459c7bd1d0885eff Item Level: 62 Quality: 0 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 53 Implicits: 1 31% increased Spell Damage Gain 40% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage Enemies you Kill have a 20% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage

Rarity: RARE Oblivion Track Sage Slippers Energy Shield: 98 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.963 Unique ID: e052b381ee259a4e5547a15d9c11bde1815188a85a46ed99630b406cbd64beff Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-B LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 2 Gain 4% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage 32% increased Effect of the Buff granted by your Lightning Golems +11 to maximum Energy Shield +151 to maximum Life +45% to Cold Resistance +34% to Lightning Resistance +35% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}20% increased Movement Speed {crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn The Coming Calamity Destroyer Regalia Energy Shield: 299 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: a64456d9e9fcf14f93bca07570c378acbfe46659b412b2b2a5e53dbe75a282ce Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-R-B-B-G LevelReq: 53 Implicits: 0 +2 to Level of Socketed Herald Gems 93% increased Energy Shield 35% chance to avoid being Stunned for each Herald Buff affecting you {mutated}100% increased Effect of Herald Buffs on you

Rarity: UNIQUE Atziri's Promise Amethyst Flask Unique ID: 44616d1a429b7598ce9ef799881476b38f42ab99db2fe079d75e19488d67db05 Item Level: 72 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 18 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect 2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect Gain 8% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Cinderswallow Urn Silver Flask Unique ID: c59d92e71e91a58bb559663464d0a8032dd08a0ccb5c718ead6f4dcd7a9d8bec Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full +19 to Maximum Charges Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 9% increased Damage Recover 2% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
